title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.221 - Planning board, rules of procedure — records (noncharter first class counties)
text:
64.221.  Planning board, rules of procedure — records (noncharter first class counties). — The county planning board may create and adopt rules for the transaction of its business and shall keep a public record of its resolutions, transactions, findings, and recommendations.
(L. 1959 S.B. 309 § 3, A.L. 1994 H.B. 1175)
